# BP-164 positive: a functional option mutates a package-level default.
lang: go
file: BP-164-vulnerable.go
variant: option-global-default
---
package sample

import "time"

type Config struct {
	Timeout time.Duration
}

type Option func(*Config)

var defaultConfig = Config{Timeout: time.Second}

func WithTimeout(timeout time.Duration) Option {
	return func(config *Config) {
		defaultConfig.Timeout = timeout
		config.Timeout = timeout
	}
}
